spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Mobile-first responsive, Bento Grids for catalog

grid_patterns.game_catalog: Bento Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6) - Mix tall and wide cards. Span logic: Hero item col-span-full md:col-span-8 row-span-2, standard item col-span-4 row-span-1.
grid_patterns.admin_dashboard: Strict Grid Hierarchy (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4) - Every pixel utilized, h-full on children.

components_strategy.buttons: Flat background with 1px inner stroke, rounded-sm for a sharp gaming look. Hover state: slightly lighter accent, subtle glow drop-shadow. Active state must meet 3:1 contrast.
components_strategy.cards: Surface color #111111, 1px border #262626, no shadow by default. On hover: border brightens to #FFE800/50, slight -translate-y-1 transform.
components_strategy.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-black/60, backdrop-blur-xl, border-b border-white/10. Sticky top positioning with z-50.
components_strategy.footer: Solid deep black #000000, massive space py-24, huge 'RiftMarket' outline text at the bottom.
components_strategy.inputs: Shadcn based, deep dark bg (#050505), border #262626, focus ring 2px #FFE800.
components_strategy.badges: Cyberpunk terminal style: text-xs uppercase tracking-widest, bg-[#FFE800]/10 text-[#FFE800] border border-[#FFE800]/30 px-2 py-1.

animations_and_interactions.hover: Explicit hover colors, subtle scale transform duration-200 ease-out.
animations_and_interactions.entrance: Framer motion staggered fade-up for grid items.
animations_and_interactions.marquee: Slow, organic continuous scrolling for 'Best Sellers' or 'Trust Indicators' using react-fast-marquee.

media_and_assets.discord_icon_instructions: Use standard react-icons/fa (FaDiscord) for the Discord logo.

hero_background.description: Abstract high-end 3D dimensional rift, matte black with cyber yellow energy

game_cover_1.description: 3d cute blocky character holding glowing neon sword

game_cover_2.description: 3d cute blocky character sitting on glowing treasure chest

game_cover_3.description: 3d stylized glowing diamond floating over a pedestal

specific_page_instructions.landing_page: Hero section must use the hero_background image with max overlay bg-black/50 (never go darker). Include large H1, prominent CTA. Use a Bento Grid for Game Catalog. Add a Marquee for Trust Indicators ('10k+ Orders Delivered', 'Secure via Dodo Payments', 'Instant Discord Delivery').
specific_page_instructions.game_page: Split layout: Sticky image/details on left, scrollable product list on right. Use Phosphor icons for stats (players, genre, release).
specific_page_instructions.checkout_and_cart: Cart as a slide-out sidebar (Sheet component from Shadcn). Checkout must integrate Dodo Payments UI securely.
specific_page_instructions.order_confirmation: Big success icon. MUST display Discord invite link explicitly (https://discord.gg/gvDs4AxP) and instruct user to paste their Order ID in the server to receive their items.
specific_page_instructions.admin_panel: Strict control room grid. Sidebar navigation. Data-dense tables for CRUD operations (Games, Products, Orders). Keep styling sharp, 1px borders, minimal padding.

testing_requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case representing their role (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-button').
